channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iranian national wanted by U.S. for $3.4 billion hacking arrested
item.description: An Iranian national sought by the U.S. for hacking attacks causing $3.4 billion in damage was arrested in Montenegro.

item.title: California voters to decide on billionaire tax measure this November
item.description: A November ballot measure would impose a one-time tax on billionaires to offset federal healthcare funding cuts.

item.title: Judge orders DOJ to release some unredacted Epstein files
item.description: A federal judge has ordered the Department of Justice to provide unredacted versions of certain Epstein files or justify why they were withheld.

item.title: King Charles will not reside in Buckingham Palace after $487 million renovation
item.description: The king and Queen Camilla have opted to remain at Clarence House, a more modest royal residence nearby.
